roa.docketEntryComment: People's Non-Opposition to Motion to Set Aside Pleas of Guilty, & Vacate Prior Judgements  & Convictions Under PC 1473.7
Order on Motion to Vacate Conviction and/or Sentence PC 1473.7

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/NP/X: CONV DATE OCTOBER 20, 1995/X: NOT REPORTED/X: THE ORDER OF 04-03-1998 DISMISSING THIS MATTER PURSUANT TO PC1203,4 IS SET ASIDE,/X: TODAY'S ORDER SUPERSEDES THE ORDER OF APRIL 3, 1998/X: PEOPLE'S NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7 MOTIONTO VACATE CONVICTION FILED- 06-21-2022/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF OCTOBER 20, 1995/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:10-20-1995/X: SENTENCE DATE:10-20-1995/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WEREILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 10-20-1995 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 10-20-1995 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
DOM VIOL CNSL'S, $100VIF, S/A FR VERONICA,SERGEO & BERTA MEDINA
B/S $10,000, S/A ORDER SIGNED FILED & SERVED
